name: salesforcedx-vscode-manager
description: Manage which Salesforce VSCode extensions are enabled, verify external dependencies, and override with local VSIX builds.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.groups.description: User-defined extension groups (merged with built-ins by id).

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.applyScope.description: What to do with managed extensions not in the applied group.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.useInternalC.description: Use undocumented workbench.extensions.action.* commands to toggle enablement. When false, the manager opens the Extensions view with a filter and lets you toggle manually.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.autoRunDepen.description: Run dependency checks automatically on startup.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.thirdPartyEx.description: Non-Salesforce extensions the manager may enable/disable as part of a group.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.vsixDirector.description: Absolute path to a directory of local .vsix files. When a managed extension has a matching vsix, it is installed from there instead of the marketplace.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.vsixAutoRein.description: Automatically reinstall a managed extension when a new matching vsix appears in the vsix directory.

salesforcedx-vscode-manager.statusBar.sh.description: Show the active group in the status bar.
Show the VSIX override indicator in the status bar when a vsix directory is set.
